'''Cortina''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] directly represented in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. Its government attempted to push its application to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] through, thinking itself superior, but eventually calmed down and earned membership.

{{Planet-stub}}
